title: Saudi Official Warns Patience Is Limited as Iranian Attacks Barrage Kingdom
summary_full: Prince Faisal bin Farhan, the foreign minister, said Saudi Arabia was prepared to take military action if necessary, after waves of missile and drone attacks.
summary_public: Prince Faisal bin Farhan, the foreign minister, said Saudi Arabia was prepared to take military action if necessary, after waves of missile and drone attacks.

SA.label: neutral
SA.evidence: Saudi Arabia was prepared to take military action
